raw.message: モンハンNowで拠点要撃戦が開幕

hook.summary: Dramatic reveal of a new lightning-infused Rathalos variant.
hook.visual_action: A blue-glowing dragon roars and lunges at the screen amidst purple lightning and energy swirls.
hook.text_overlay: 次元臨界リオレウス登場
hook.voiceover_transcript: 次元臨界リオレウス登場

scene_flow: Dramatic introduction of the Dimensional Critical Rathalos with intense lightning effects.
Montage of the monster performing powerful fire and lightning breath attacks in a city setting.
Event announcement for the Base Interception Battle occurring from April 13th to 19th.
Closing logo and tagline emphasizing the ease of hunting monsters on a smartphone.
on_screen_text: 次元臨界リオレウス登場
スマホで、サクッとモンハン
cta_text: スマホで、サクッとモンハン
audience_proxy: Fans of the Monster Hunter series and action RPG enthusiasts looking for high-quality mobile combat.
